_provenance: Synthesized from KMA VilageFcstInfoService_2.0 technical guide (2021-12). Parameters: RE=6371.00877, GRID=5.0, SLAT1=30, SLAT2=60, OLON=126, OLAT=38, XO=43, YO=136. All (nx, ny) values are the direct output of the reference LCC formula (latlon_to_grid in grid_coords.py). The KMA docs cite 서울청사 as a canonical example; the exact coordinates used here produce (62, 128) with the KMA formula.
